// Code generated by github.com/romshark/datapages; DO NOT EDIT.

// Package action provides generators for datastar action hypertext references.
// These references must be used in the templates.
package action

import "strings"

// POSTAppSearch references /search/
func POSTAppSearch(query QueryPOSTAppSearch) string {
	anyQuery := query.Term != ""

	var b strings.Builder
	l := len("@post('/search/") + len("')")
	if anyQuery {
		l += len("?")
	}
	n := 0
	if query.Term != "" {
		if n > 0 {
			l += len("&")
		}
		l += len("t=") + len(query.Term)
	}

	b.Grow(l)

	b.WriteString("@post('/search/")
	if anyQuery {
		b.WriteString("?")
	}
	n = 0
	if query.Term != "" {
		if n > 0 {
			b.WriteString("&")
		}
		b.WriteString("t=")
		b.WriteString(query.Term)
	}
	b.WriteString("')")

	return b.String()
}

type QueryPOSTAppSearch struct {
	Term string `query:"t"`
}
